title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.articleTitle: The Role of Technology in Modern Life
content.text: In today's fast-paced world, technology plays an (0) role in shaping society. (17) telecommunication systems have greatly (18) the way we connect with one another. Online platforms have become (19) indispensable in professional and personal settings. Moreover, the rapid (20) of digital tools has led to an increase in (21) among users, as people are required to constantly update their skills to keep up.||Despite the benefits, there are concerns about the (22) of technology on our lives. Some argue that over-reliance on digital devices can lead to (23) consequences, impacting everything from mental health to social interactions. Therefore, finding a balance remains (24).

example.text: In the past, people have (0) embraced new technologies.
example.explanation: Adverb required to modify the main verb; TRADITION → TRADITIONALLY.

questions.explanation: Adjective required to describe 'telecommunication systems'; ADVANCE → ADVANCED.
Past tense verb required; REVOLUTION → REVOLUTIONIZED.
Adverb required to modify 'indispensable'; INCREASE → INCREASINGLY.
Noun required as subject of the clause; DEVELOP → DEVELOPMENT.
Noun required to express the concept of skill; COMPETENT → COMPETENCY.
Noun required as the subject of the sentence; INFLUENCE remains unchanged.
Adjective with negative prefix required; DESIRE → UNDESIRABLE.
Adjective required to describe 'balance'; VITAL remains unchanged.
